meta.title: East Africa Safari Destinations — Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda & Rwanda
meta.description: Discover East Africa's four great safari countries. From Kenya's Masai Mara and Tanzania's Serengeti to Uganda's gorilla forests and Rwanda's Volcanoes — an expert guide to where to go and why.
meta.ogTitle: East Africa Safari Destinations | Divine Travel Nest Safaris
meta.ogDescription: Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda & Rwanda — an expert guide to East Africa's four great safari countries.
meta.collectionDescription: Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda and Rwanda — an expert guide to East Africa's four great safari countries.

hero.description: Kenya, Tanzania, Uganda and Rwanda — four countries, each with its own character. We help you choose, combine, and experience the best of all of them.

kenya.name: Kenya
kenya.tagline: Home of the Big Five & the Great Migration
kenya.description: Kenya is East Africa's classic safari destination — open golden savannahs, iconic Masai culture, and the greatest wildlife spectacle on Earth. The country that invented the word safari.
highlights: Big Five in a single country

tanzania.name: Tanzania
tanzania.description: Tanzania holds Africa's greatest national park — the Serengeti — plus the world-famous Ngorongoro Crater, an intact volcanic caldera with resident Big Five year-round and a white-sand coast to match.

uganda.name: Uganda
uganda.tagline: Gorilla trekking & chimp tracking in the Pearl of Africa
uganda.description: Uganda is Africa's most biodiverse secret — dense rainforests sheltering mountain gorillas and chimpanzees, savannah with tree-climbing lions, and the thundering Murchison Falls. Few places move you this way.

rwanda.name: Rwanda
rwanda.description: Small, safe, and remarkably biodiverse — Rwanda packs gorilla treks, savannah game drives, golden-monkey encounters and Nyungwe chimp forest into a country you can cross in a morning.
